# Neural Experience

> AI-powered interactive platform with neural network visualization, collaboration canvas, voice controls, real-time data analytics, and a no-login AI chat.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the platform's features — neural network visualization, collaboration canvas, real-time dashboard, and gamification.
- [AI Chat](/chat): Session-based AI chat with selectable personality modes. No sign-up required.
- [AI Chart Generator Guide](/tools/chart-generator): Guide to turning data and natural-language prompts into charts with AI — chart type selection, prompting patterns, and FAQs.
